totp.lockout: 🔒 Too many failed attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.

desktop_totp.ok:
✅ Desktop unlocked for {minutes} min.
Now repeat your desktop request.
desktop_totp.invalid: ❌ Invalid TOTP code. Try again or /cancel to abort.
desktop_totp.lockout: 🔒 Too many failed attempts. Wait {minutes} min.

math.prompt:
⚠️ Destructive command: *{cmd}*
Answer to continue: {a} + {b} = ?
(/cancel to abort)
math.too_many: ❌ Too many failed attempts. Operation cancelled.
math.too_many_wrong: ❌ Too many wrong answers. Operation cancelled.

guardrail.confirm:
⚠️ This request involves a destructive or dangerous operation.
Do you want to continue? (yes/no)
(/cancel to abort)
guardrail.ask_yn: ⚠️ Please reply with *yes* or *no*. (/cancel to abort)

cancel.nothing: ℹ️ No active operation to cancel.

cmd.unknown:
❓ Unknown command: {cmd}
Type /help to see commands.
cmd.wiz_auto_cancelled: ℹ️ Ongoing project creation wizard was cancelled.
cmd.wiz_empty_name: ⚠️ Project name cannot be empty. Try again:
cmd.pdf_cancelled: ❌ PDF operation cancelled. (Please select from buttons)
cmd.use_restart_instead:
ℹ️ To restart the service, you need to use the `/restart` command.

This command requires a math challenge + admin TOTP security chain.
cmd.use_shutdown_instead:
ℹ️ To shut down the service, you need to use the `/shutdown` command.

This command requires a math challenge + admin TOTP security chain.

msg.error: ⚠️ An unexpected error occurred while processing your message. Please try again.

guard.rate_limit: ⏳ Too many requests. Please wait a minute.

help.unknown_cmd:
❓ `{cmd}` is not a known command.
Type /help to see all commands.
help.menu_title:
🤖 BalGPT

What would you like to do?
help.fallback:
Commands:
/help [/cmd]     — This menu or command details
/history [N|summary] — Recent messages
/project [id]    — Set active project (TOTP)
/lang <tr|en>    — Change language
/model           — {model_hint}
/beta       — Exit beta mode

Create project:
  Menu → New Project → enter name → select type:
  • Software Project  (CLAUDE.md, BACKLOG.md ...)
  • Save Task         (README + outputs/)
  • Folder Only       (empty folder)

System commands:
/root-reset  — Reset session
/restart     — Restart services
/terminal <cmd> — Run shell command (dangerous → admin TOTP)
⚠️ Destructive (math + admin TOTP):
/shutdown    — Stop service

Scheduling (TOTP):
/schedule                        → list
/schedule ekle 0 9 * * * <desc>  → 9am daily — Bridge prompt
/schedule mesaj 0 9 * * * <text> → 9am daily — fixed message
/schedule sil|durdur|başlat <id>
Natural language: 'Write a brief every morning at 9' → Claude creates it

Non-command messages go to Claude. 💬

restart.bridge_timeout:
❌ Bridge restart timed out ({svc}).
Manual check required.

shutdown.docker_warning:
⚠️ In Docker, /shutdown restarts the API container (restart: unless-stopped). Use `docker compose stop` to fully stop services.

Restarting API...

root_reset.ok: ✅ Session reset. A new session will start with your next message.
root_reset.failed: ❌ Session reset failed. Bridge may be unreachable — try /restart.

schedule.usage:
Usage:
/schedule                       → list
/schedule ekle <cron> <desc>    → bridge prompt
/schedule mesaj <cron> <text>   → fixed message
/schedule sil <id>
/schedule durdur <id>
/schedule başlat <id>
schedule.empty:
📭 No scheduled tasks found.
Create one with /schedule ekle.
schedule.list_footer: ℹ️ By ID prefix: /schedule sil <id> · /schedule durdur <id>
schedule.add_format_error:
❌ Format: /schedule ekle <m> <h> <d> <mo> <dw> <description>
example: /schedule ekle 0 9 * * * Daily brief

project.cleared: ✅ Active project cleared. Main mode active.

📌 Active project: *{name}*
To change: /project <id>
To exit: /project none
project.set_ok:
✅ Active project: *{name}*
Messages like 'backlog', 'report' will now relate to this project.
To exit: /project none
project.beta_started:
🔀 Beta mode started: *{name}*
Messages are being forwarded to the project.
To exit: /beta

root_project.none:
ℹ️ No root project selected.
Usage: `/root-project <project-id>`
root_project.set_ok:
🏠 Root project set: *{name}*
Path: `{path}`
To exit: `/root-exit`

root_exit.not_set: ℹ️ No root project is currently selected.
root_exit.ok:
↩️ Exited root project context ({name}).
Returned to 99-root directory.

beta_exit.already_main: ℹ️ You are already in main agent mode.
beta_exit.ok: ↩️ Exited beta mode ({id}). Returned to main agent.

project_delete.ok:
🗑 Project deleted: *{name}* (`{id}`)
📁 Directory not deleted: `{path}`
You can remove the files manually.

root_check.idle_with_history:
⚫ Root is currently idle.

menu.no_projects:
📁 No projects yet.

Would you like to create a new project?
menu.pdf_not_found: ❌ PDF not found, please send it again.
menu.project_delete_totp:

Enter Admin TOTP:

All scheduled tasks will run according to the new timezone.

chat.bridge_api_error: ⚠️ Agent encountered a temporary error. Please try again.

wizard.ask_description:
Describe the purpose of *{name}*:
_(Will be added to file headers and CLAUDE.md — type '-' to skip)_
wizard.options_title:
*{name}* — Options
Change any item, then confirm when ready:
wizard.path_confirm:
📁 Project path:
`{path}`

Would you like to change it?
wizard.path_input_prompt:
Enter new project path:
_(Current: `{current}` — type '-' to skip)_
wizard.path_absolute_required:
⚠️ An absolute path is required (must start with /).
_(e.g. /home/user/projects/my-project)_
wizard.path_traversal_error: ⚠️ Path cannot contain '..'. Enter a valid path:
wizard.path_unsafe_prefix:
⚠️ This path points to a disallowed directory.
Allowed roots: `/home/`, `/tmp/`, `/opt/`
_(type '-' to skip)_
wizard.service_intro:
⚙️ *Service configuration*

A service = a long-running process your project runs in the background (e.g. FastAPI server, Express app, worker). For each service I'll ask:

1. *Name* — tmux window name (e.g. api, worker)
2. *Command* — start command (e.g. uvicorn main:app)
3. *Port* — listening port (if any)
4. *Working directory* — which folder the command runs in

You can add/remove services later from the /project menu.
wizard.service_name_prompt:
⚙️ Service #{count} — *Name*
_Tmux window name. Letters, digits, `-`, `_` only._
_Example: api, web, worker (max 50 chars)_
wizard.service_name_invalid:
⚠️ Invalid service name. Only letters, digits, `-` and `_` are allowed; no spaces or special characters (max 50 chars).
Try again:
wizard.service_cmd_prompt:
*{name}* — *Start command*
_A single command to start the service. Do not use shell redirection (`>`, `&`, `|`)._
_Example: `uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8020`_
_Example (Node): `node server.js`_
wizard.service_cmd_unsafe:
⚠️ Command cannot contain `;`, `|`, `>`, `&`, `$` characters.
Use a wrapper script instead of shell redirection.
Enter the command again:
wizard.service_port_prompt:
*Port number*
_TCP port the service listens on (1-65535). Metadata only; if the command already has --port it's auto-detected._
_Example: 8020_
_If no port: type `-`_
wizard.service_port_invalid: ⚠️ Invalid port. Enter a number between 1-65535 or '-' to skip:
wizard.service_cwd_prompt:
*Working directory*
_Folder the command runs in. Empty = project root._
_Example: src (run inside project/src/)_
_To skip: `-`_
wizard.ai_forced_mds: ⚠️ AI preview active — CLAUDE.md and README.md will be created automatically
wizard.overwrite_confirm:
⚠️ Directory already exists and contains files:
`{path}`

Continuing may overwrite existing files. Proceed?
wizard.duplicate_name:
❌ A project named *{name}* already exists.
Try again with a different name: /project new
wizard.create_failed:
❌ Could not create project: {error}
Try a different name: /project new
wizard.permission_error:
❌ Could not create project directory: `{path}`
Path is not accessible. Try a different path: /project new
wizard.unexpected_error: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again: /project new
wizard.opt_svc_no_desc: For static files, CLI tools, libraries etc.
wizard.ask_auto_arch:
🤖 Generate an AI architecture suggestion for *{name}*?

Based on your description I'll propose a stack, folder layout and short architecture note. You can accept / edit / skip.
wizard.arch_edit_prompt: ✏️ What should change? Write a short note (e.g. 'add PostgreSQL, remove Redis'):
wizard.arch_failed: ⚠️ Could not generate AI preview. You can continue or edit and retry.

install_wizard.welcome:
👋 *Welcome to the BalGPT setup wizard!*

Terminal setup is complete. Let's finish the rest (LLM, capabilities, timezone, TOTP) here.

Tap the button below to begin.
install_wizard.not_owner: 🔒 This wizard is private to the owner.
install_wizard.already_done: ℹ️ Wizard already completed. To re-run: `bash install.sh --reconfigure-capabilities` or `/wizard`.
install_wizard.llm_prompt:
*Step 1/5 — LLM provider*

🤖 Which LLM do you want to use?

You can change it later with `/model`. Type `/cancel` anytime to exit the wizard (saved values are kept).
install_wizard.anthropic_prompt:
*Step 2/5 — Anthropic authentication*

🔑 Pick a method:

• *Claude Login* — use your claude.ai subscription (recommended)
• *API Key* — pay-per-use key from Anthropic Console
install_wizard.anthropic_key_prompt:
*Step 2/5 — Anthropic API key*

🔑 Send the key (starts with `sk-ant-api03-...`).
Console: console.anthropic.com → Settings → API Keys → Create Key
install_wizard.claude_login_note:
✅ After the wizard finishes, run this on the **host machine** (not inside the container):

```
claude auth login
```

The Bridge won't work without it. Anthropic credentials are bind-mounted into the container.
install_wizard.bad_anthropic_key:
⚠️ Key format looks wrong.

Expected: starts with `sk-ant-api03-`, at least 24 alphanumeric characters.
Send again or `/cancel` to exit.
install_wizard.ollama_url_prompt:
*Step 2/5 — Ollama URL*

🌐 Send the Ollama server base URL.
Default: `http://localhost:11434`
(Use the default if Ollama runs on the same machine.)
install_wizard.ollama_model_prompt:
*Step 2/5 — Ollama model*

📦 Which model should we use?
Examples: `llama3`, `qwen2.5`, `mistral`
(The model must already be pulled via `ollama pull <name>`.)
install_wizard.gemini_key_prompt:
*Step 2/5 — Gemini API key*

🔑 Send the key (starts with `AIza...`).
Get one at: aistudio.google.com → API Keys → Create API Key
install_wizard.bad_gemini_key:
⚠️ Key format looks wrong.

Expected: starts with `AIza`, at least 24 alphanumeric characters.
Send again or `/cancel` to exit.
install_wizard.bad_url:
⚠️ Expected a valid URL.

Expected format: `http://...` or `https://...`
Example: `http://localhost:11434`
Send again.
install_wizard.cap_prompt:
*Step 3/5 — Capabilities*

🛠️ Uncheck anything you don't want:

✓ = enabled, ☐ = disabled

Defaults are sensible — if unsure, just tap *Done* and continue. You can change them later with `bash install.sh --reconfigure-capabilities`.
install_wizard.tz_prompt:
*Step 4/5 — Timezone*

🕒 Scheduled tasks and reminders use this timezone.
install_wizard.tz_custom_prompt:
*Step 4/5 — Custom timezone*

Send an IANA timezone name.
Examples: `Europe/Berlin`, `America/Chicago`, `Asia/Dubai`
Full list: en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones
install_wizard.bad_tz:
⚠️ Expected a valid IANA timezone.

Format: `Region/City` (e.g. `Europe/Istanbul`, `America/Chicago`).
Full list: en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones
Send again.
install_wizard.totp_caption:
*Step 5/5 — TOTP ({label})*

🔐 Scan this QR with Google Authenticator / Authy.

Manual secret:
`{secret}`
install_wizard.totp_missing: ⚠️ TOTP secret ({label}) not found — check your `.env` file.
install_wizard.done:
🎉 *Setup complete!*

Restart services for the changes to take effect:

• If you're on Docker:
```
docker compose restart
```
• If you're on systemd:
```
sudo systemctl restart personal-agent.service personal-agent-bridge.service
```
• If you're on PM2:
```
pm2 restart 99-api 99-bridge
```

Get started with: `/help` — all commands.
install_wizard.env_write_failed: ❌ Failed to write `.env`. Check server logs.
